valueExpression.expression: iif(%allSegmentsAnswered, iif(%hasLowSegment or %totalScore <= 5, %options.where(code='71978007'), iif(%totalScore >= 8, %options.where(code='20572008'), %options.where(code='88323005'))))

valueExpression.expression: item.where(text='Rechter colon').answer.value.weight()

valueExpression.expression: item.where(text='Linker colon').answer.value.weight()

valueExpression.expression: %rechterColonScore.combine(%transversumScore).combine(%linkerColonScore).sum()

valueExpression.name: hasLowSegment

valueExpression.expression: %rechterColonScore.exists() and %transversumScore.exists() and %linkerColonScore.exists()

valueExpression.expression: %totalScoreGrootteZweren + %totalScoreOppervlakteUlceratie + %totalScoreAangetasteOppervlakte + %totalScoreAanwezigheidVernauwing
